intent: Represent a customer whose discretionary outflows repeatedly exceed intended category budgets.
expectedEvaluatorBehavior: Evaluator should flag repeated budget overruns and declining month-end resilience.
customerProfileSummary: High-discretionary profile with frequent non-essential card spending bursts.
whatToLookFor: Elevated budget utilization, higher cash pressure, and larger debit spikes.
realWorldPattern: Frequent impulse spending and above-target dining/shopping.
sanitizedNotice: Entirely synthetic transaction stream with non-real merchants and profiles.
